title: ElevenLabs Outbound Sales Agent — Eric the Car Salesperson
description: Outbound AI sales agent that calls a prospect on Twilio and runs a discovery conversation about a new car. Built on ElevenLabs Conversational AI's Twilio bridge; supports dynamic prompts and first messages per call.

tools.name: outbound_call
tools.description: Initiate an outbound call with dynamic prompt and first_message

notes: ElevenLabs Conversational AI bundles STT/LLM/TTS — the LLM is selectable per-agent in the dashboard. STT defaults to ElevenLabs Scribe. Cost band uses ElevenLabs Agents' published $0.08–0.12/min plus ~$0.01/min Twilio.
